'''Conil Barje''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

==Biography==
Conil sold all his possessions in order to move to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] with his wife [[Camelle Barje|Camelle]] and their new-born [[Tekil Barje|child]], to live the simple life of [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmers]]. He was killed when [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] [[Attack on Mochot Steep|raided]] the trading site at [[Mochot Steep/Legends|Mochot Steep]]. He was hit in the back of his head with a [[Gaderffii/Legends|gaderffii]] and it snapped his neck.

{{Char-stub}}
